description: Detainee card in portrait format on a near-black background textured with dark topographic contour lines. At top-left, in white bold caps preceded by a red double-chevron '>>', is the tag 'MEXICO'. Centered is a framed booking photograph of a middle-aged man with slicked-back graying hair pulled into a small ponytail, a graying mustache and stubble, deep facial lines, and a flat expression, wearing a gray sweatshirt with a black collar, shot against a plain light wall. Overlaid across the bottom of the photo is a bold red banner with a folded-corner effect bearing white uppercase text 'CHILD PREDATOR'. At the bottom-center is the circular DHS/ICE seal next to the 'ICE' wordmark, the italic word 'in', and the location 'YAKIMA WASHINGTON'. The accompanying tweet identifies the man as Antonio Castaneda-Oseguera and states a strong-arm rape and child-molestation conviction.
notable_text: MEXICO. CHILD PREDATOR. ICE in Yakima Washington.
